unique_value.note: 125 unique calculators, 107 quality blog posts, data hub. No thin guides in sitemap.

content_depth.note: Mortgage calculator template applied to all. Formulas, examples, sources. Editorial policy with AI disclosure.

trust_transparency.note: All trust claims verified. No professional-grade, no fake ratings, no unsupported claims live. Methodology in footer.

navigation_ux.note: Clean Calculators-only nav. No Sign In/Get Started. Footer has Data/Loan/Methodology. No i18n key leakage.

policy_compliance.note: All policies complete. AI disclosure present. Corrections process documented. Last-updated dates.

technical_quality.note: Count 125 consistent. No broken links. Dynamic rendering bypasses cache. TypeScript clean.

monetization_safety.note: No AdSense code on unsafe pages. Adsterra should be restricted but reviewed separately.
